auth.loggedout: You have been logged out successfully.
auth.thankyou: Thank you for visiting. We hope to see you again soon!

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
error.notAuthenticated: User authentication information is missing. Please log in again.
error.content_load_failed: Failed to load content. Please try again later.

wallet.cannot_disconnect_only_method: Cannot disconnect. This is your only login method. Use the Logout button in the navigation bar to sign out.
wallet.confirm_disconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect your wallet?
wallet.disconnect_error: Failed to disconnect wallet. Please try again.
wallet.signature_rejected: Signature request was rejected. Unlink cancelled.

intro.title: How to Join
intro.description: Follow these steps to register for the whitelist.

step1.title: Connect Wallet
step1.description: A browser wallet extension is required.

step2.title: Approve Signature Request
step2.description: Free, no gas fees. Only your wallet address is registered.

intro.notice: No funds will be transferred. Signing is for submitting a valid address.

safetyNotice.line1: Your wallet address is only used for whitelist registration.
safetyNotice.line2: No tokens or NFTs will be transferred during this process.
safetyNotice.line3: Never share your seed phrase with anyone, including Nasun.

connecting.title: Connecting Wallet
connecting.description: Please connect your wallet to continue.

signing.title: Waiting for Signature
signing.description: Please sign the message in your wallet.

success.title: Successfully Joined!
success.description: You have successfully joined the Frontiers whitelist.

alreadyJoined.title: Already Joined
alreadyJoined.description: This wallet address is already registered in the Frontiers whitelist.

error.title: Error Occurred
error.description: An error occurred while processing your request.

alreadyWithdrawn.title: Already Withdrawn
alreadyWithdrawn.description: This wallet address has already been withdrawn from the whitelist.

login.title: Login to NASUN
login.noTransaction: • This signature does NOT transfer any funds
login.ownershipVerification: • This is only to verify you own this wallet
login.officialSiteOnly: • Only sign on the official NASUN website

joinWhitelist.title: Join Nasun Frontiers Whitelist
